title: Cyclic Quad FAIL: demonstrates a wrong Brahmagupta-Fibonacci value
sources: Ptolemy's theorem via Wildberger rational trigonometry (Wildberger, 2005)
_fixture_purpose: Negative fixture (added 2026-07-06 to close a fixture-coverage gap -- this family previously had zero FAIL fixtures). Plants a deterministically detectable violation: pair (d1,e1)=(2,1),(d2,e2)=(3,2) declares G1*G2=99 instead of the correct 5*13=65.
